title: Detective Bureau 2-3: Go to Hell Bastards!
original_title: 探偵事務所２３ くたばれ悪党ども
overview: Tajima is a private detective in charge of his own company, Detective Bureau 2-3. When warring criminal gangs go overboard by robbing U.S. military munitions, Tajima steps in to stop what the cops can't.
